title: senecio jacobaeiformis
intro: Senecio jacobaeiformis, also known as Ragwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as reducing fever and relieving respiratory problems like bronchitis. Senecio jacobaeiformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to extract its active compounds and utilize its medicinal properties.
